title: Food Production
description: Meat gathering and hunting mechanics form a core survival challenge on the outer rim. Players must hunt animals, preserve food, and manage food supplies for their crew. Food spoilage and storage are important considerations.
definition-of-done: Hunting produces meat resources. Food storage and spoilage systems work. Crew consumes food over time. Starvation causes negative effects.
testing-plan: Verify hunting produces food. Test food spoilage timing. Verify crew food consumption. Test starvation effects.
